SEARCH
Package io.github.senthilganeshs.fj.hkt

Interface Higher<W,A>

Type Parameters:
W - The witness type representing the type constructor (e.g., Maybe.µ).
A - The type argument.
All Known Subinterfaces:
Either<A,B>, LazyList<T>, List<T>, Maybe<T>, These<A,B>
All Known Implementing Classes:
Const, Either.Left, Either.Right, Gen, Identity, IO, LazyList.Empty, LazyList.NonEmpty, List.EmptyList, List.LinkedList, Maybe.Nothing, Maybe.Some, NonEmptyList, Reader, ReaderTaskEither, State, Task, TaskEither, These.Both, These.That, These.This, Writer
public interface Higher<W,A>
A witness interface for Higher-Kinded Types in Java.

Used to represent a type constructor F applied to type argument A as F<A>.
